title: cyclosorus adenostegius
intro: Cyclosorus adenostegius, also known as the Chinese leather fern, is a species of fern in the genus Cyclosorus. It is native to Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Cyclosorus adenostegius is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to treat various ailments, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
